input.code_to_execute:
results = []
queries = [
    'site:neo4j.com Neo4j Aura API authentication docs',
    'site:neo4j.com Neo4j Aura API bearer token docs',
    'site:neo4j.com neo4j docs api swagger aura',
    'site:neo4j.com Neo4j pricing Aura free',
    'site:neo4j.com Neo4j model context protocol',
    'site:neo4j.com Neo4j cypher HTTP API docs',
    'site:neo4j.com Neo4j server HTTP API authentication basic auth docs'
]
for q in queries:
    r,e = web_search(q)
    results.append({'query': q, 'error': e, 'result': r[:4000] if isinstance(r, str) else r})
output = results
print(output)
input.thought: Use web search helper to locate canonical official Neo4j documentation URLs when the browser task hit thin/404 docs pages.

raw_result.description: Graph database platform with managed Aura APIs for instance management and HTTP query execution via Cypher.
raw_result.auth_notes: Official Neo4j docs indicate the Aura API uses OAuth 2.0 client-credentials to obtain a Bearer access token, then API calls use Authorization: Bearer <access_token>. Official Neo4j HTTP/API docs also document HTTP Basic authentication for query/database access. The bearer access token is included because first-party docs explicitly describe using it on API requests.
raw_result.gating_reason: Neo4j pricing publicly offers AuraDB Free as a forever-free self-serve tier with no credit card required.

api_surface.breadth: Neo4j publicly documents multiple HTTP-based surfaces, including the Aura platform management API and HTTP query/transaction APIs for executing Cypher against databases.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Neo4j has an official Model Context Protocol offering/page and official MCP server documentation for connecting AI agents to Neo4j.

raw_result.rate_limit_notes: No concrete official rate-limit details were verified from the gathered page content. Aura bearer tokens were noted as expiring after one hour in the gathered official-doc evidence summary.
raw_result.notable_signals: Official docs describe separate surfaces for Aura management and database querying, AuraDB Free is self-serve, and Neo4j advertises an official MCP solution/server presence.
raw_result.human_review_reason: Some structured fields remain insufficiently supported by directly read page text in the gathered evidence set: auth_methods includes both bearer token and basic based on evidence summaries rather than fully inspected canonical auth pages in-chat, and MCP existence/buildability rely on an official solution page without deeper directly read server docs. The hint docs path also appeared thin/partly stale during browsing.
